home.title: From ideas to architecture,
home.sub: Horlynat Mampassi Mbama — web & mobile developer, cybersecurity consultant and insurance technician. Symfony backend, API Platform and Next.js frontend designed as one system, AI-assisted.
home.diagramCaption: this site's real architecture — not an illustration

about.title: Who I am
about.p1: I design and build web applications end to end: a solid back office, a well-structured API, and a fast client-side interface. I like clean architectures, where each piece has a clear role.
about.p2: On this portfolio, I apply my own method: a Symfony back office for management, an API Platform layer, a decoupled Next.js frontend, and an AI assistant that helps visitors get to know me and qualify their need.

skills.lede: Each card matches a real building block of the stack used on this site.

about.title: Building systems that last,
about.sub: Full-stack developer and AI solutions integrator, with a rare double background: expertise in insurance and cybersecurity, alongside hands-on practice in web, mobile development and design.

bio.title: Who I am
bio.p1: Versatile, passionate and deeply committed, I draw on multidisciplinary expertise spanning insurance, web and mobile development, cybersecurity and web design.
bio.p2: My path started with a degree in mathematics, before training as a web integrator developer and then as an insurance technician. This dual background gives me a rare perspective: I understand both a company's business logic and how to translate it into reliable technical systems.
bio.p3: On this portfolio, I apply my own method: a Symfony back office for management, an API Platform layer as the single entry point, a decoupled Next.js frontend, and an AI assistant that represents me and qualifies requests even before we talk directly.

vision.title: My view of the craft, today and tomorrow
vision.lede: What I think about the current state of web development, and what's changing.
vision.todayText: API-first decoupling is becoming the norm rather than the exception: a backend handling data and business logic, an API as the single entry point, and interchangeable frontends depending on the use case (web, mobile, assistant).
vision.tomorrowText: AI assistants will become a fully-fledged interaction layer, on par with a web or mobile frontend, consuming the same API — not a bolted-on gadget, but an interface designed from the start.

skillsDetail.title: What I master
skillsDetail.lede: The detail of the stack used daily, including on this site.

why.title: What makes the difference
why.card1Title: A dual business and technical reading
why.card1Desc: Years spent managing risks and insurance contracts taught me to understand a business need before writing code.
why.card2Title: Cybersecurity built in from the start
why.card2Desc: As a cybersecurity consultant, I don't treat security as a layer added afterwards, but as a design criterion.
why.card3Title: An AI assistant that answers before I do
why.card3Desc: You can qualify your need and get to know me 24/7, without waiting for a first meeting.
why.card4Title: Design and development under one roof
why.card4Desc: As a graphic and web designer on top of developer, I can carry a project from mockup to deployment.

cta.title: Want to talk about it?
cta.sub: Describe your project directly, or ask my AI assistant — it knows my profile as well as I do.

skills.title: A wide range,
skills.sub: Web and mobile development, AI, cybersecurity, insurance and design: fields that seem unrelated, but converge as soon as it's about understanding a need and answering it with a reliable system.

domain.title: Cybersecurity and insurance
domain.lede: Two fields that directly shape how I design technical systems.
domain.cyberText: An approach to security as a design criterion: access management, system reliability, team awareness — not a layer bolted on afterwards.
domain.assuranceText: Trained insurance technician, with hands-on experience handling quotes, contracts and client portfolio management.

soft.title: What can't be coded
soft.lede: Qualities that matter as much as the technical stack in a collaboration.

cta.title: A skill in mind for your project?
cta.sub: Development, cybersecurity, design or insurance consulting — describe your need and I'll tell you how these skills apply.

projects.title: Systems that ship,
projects.sub: This site is the first concrete proof. The following projects will be added over time.

caseStudy.title: This portfolio, as a demonstration
caseStudy.lede: The most accomplished project to date is the one you're browsing right now.
caseStudy.cardText: Backend, API, frontend and AI assistant — each with a clear role.
caseStudy.bodyText1: A showcase site designed like a real product: a Symfony back office for content management, API Platform as the single entry point, a decoupled Next.js frontend, and an AI assistant that presents my profile and qualifies project requests on my behalf.
caseStudy.bodyText2: The goal: the site itself demonstrates how I design an architecture — every piece replaceable without breaking the others.

freelances.title: Let's build projects
freelances.sub: Client projects that go beyond what one person can carry are opened up to associated freelancers. Create your profile to be suggested for matching assignments.

how.title: Three steps, one single tracking
how.lede: Everything goes through the same back office used to manage client projects.
how.step1Desc: Skills, availability, and the type of assignments you're interested in.
how.step2Desc: When a client request goes beyond what one person can carry, your profile is highlighted if it matches.
how.step3Desc: Centralized tracking, clear roles, a single point of contact with the client.

benefits.title: What you gain
benefits.b1Desc: The client's need, budget and timeline are clarified before being proposed to you.
benefits.b2Desc: No scattering across tools: everything happens in the same space as the rest of the project.
benefits.b3Desc: Backend, frontend, mobile, design or cybersecurity, your specialty is highlighted, not diluted.
benefits.b4Desc: A direct collaborator, not an anonymous platform.

signup.title: Create my profile
signup.lede: A few details are enough to get started — the rest can be filled in later.
signup.faq1A: Less than two minutes. The profile can be completed or edited at any time.
signup.faq2Q: Do I need to be available right away?
signup.faq2A: No, the availability you indicate is exactly what's used to only suggest compatible assignments.
signup.faq3A: Yes, select all the ones that match your profile.
signup.success: Profile sent — we'll get back to you as soon as a project matches.
signup.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

contact.title: Two ways to
contact.sub: A guided questionnaire if you already have a clear idea of your need, or a quick appointment if you'd rather talk about it directly.

wizard.step1Question: What type of service are you looking for?
wizard.step2Question: How did you hear about me?
wizard.step3Question: Describe your project in a few sentences
wizard.fileHint: Requirements doc, mockup or example — any format accepted.
wizard.step4QuestionOther: The need isn't fully defined yet — do you still have an approximate range?
wizard.reassurance1: Before the final submission, my AI assistant will ask you 1 or 2 quick questions to refine your request.
wizard.reassurance2: Your information is only used to qualify your request. Response within 48h, via your chosen channel.
wizard.consent: I agree that this information may be used to process my request.
wizard.errorRequired: Please fill in this field to continue.
wizard.iaThanks: Thanks, I've noted these details — your request is ready to go.
wizard.iaQuestionOther: To better qualify your need: what concrete outcome are you expecting?
wizard.iaQuestionBudget: Do you still have a budget ceiling, even approximate, not to exceed?
wizard.iaQuestionDefault: Is there an existing system or hosting setup I should take into account?
wizard.iaQuestionLast: One last thing the questionnaire may not have covered that I should know?
wizard.successText: Thank you, your quote request has been sent. Horlynat or his AI assistant will get back to you shortly, via your chosen channel.
wizard.errorSubmit: Something went wrong while sending, please try again.

rdv.title: Talk before you commit
rdv.text: Don't have a precise brief yet? A short conversation is often enough to clarify the direction.
rdv.point1: 15 to 30 minutes, by video call or phone
rdv.messagePlaceholder: A word on what you'd like to discuss...
rdv.success: Request sent — you'll receive a confirmation by email.
rdv.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

legal.title: Legal notice & privacy
legal.editorText: This site is published professionally by Horlynat Mampassi Mbama, independent full-stack developer based in Brazzaville, Republic of Congo.
legal.hostingText: Hosting provider details once the site is deployed.
legal.ipText: All content on this site (text, visuals, code, brand identity) is the property of Horlynat Mampassi Mbama, unless stated otherwise.
legal.privacyText: This section explains what information is collected on this site, for what purpose, and how it is processed.
legal.dataText: Depending on the form used: name and email address, project description, preferred contact channel, skills and availability (freelancer form).
legal.purposeText: This information is used only to qualify your request, get back to you, and where applicable prepare a quote or arrange an appointment.
legal.rightsText: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time by writing via the contact form.
legal.cookiesText: This site uses your browser's local storage to temporarily keep your progress in forms and your display preferences, only for the duration of your visit.
legal.aiText: The conversational assistant on this site answers based on predefined information about Horlynat Mampassi Mbama's profile. It does not constitute a contractual commitment.

aiAssistant.title: Horlynat's assistant
aiAssistant.sub: answers on my behalf — profile, projects, vision
aiAssistant.greeting: Hello, I'm Horlynat's AI assistant. I can introduce his profile, skills, projects, view of the craft, or qualify your project request. What would you like to know?
aiAssistant.fallback: I can tell you about his profile, skills, projects, view of the craft, or help you qualify a project request. What would you like to know more about?
aiAssistant.answerPresentation: I'm the assistant of Horlynat Mampassi Mbama, based in Brazzaville. He's a versatile professional: full-stack, mobile developer and AI solutions integrator, but also a cybersecurity consultant and insurance technician.
aiAssistant.answerCompetences: On the development side: Symfony, API Platform, Next.js, React, Vue.js, Python (Django, Flask), and AI/data with TensorFlow, PyTorch and scikit-learn. He also does mobile with Flutter, design with Figma and Photoshop.
aiAssistant.answerRealisations: His most accomplished work to date is this portfolio itself: Symfony/API Platform/Next.js architecture with a built-in AI assistant.
aiAssistant.answerPhilosophie: His view: technology is only worthwhile if it serves a real business need, and cybersecurity must be designed in from the start, not bolted on afterwards.
aiAssistant.answerPourquoi: Because he combines business expertise (insurance, risk management), cybersecurity, full-range development and design — rare to find all of that in one person.
aiAssistant.answerProjet: Tell me the type of service, your indicative budget and desired timeline, and I'll prepare your request for Horlynat.
